source.section: Part 10 - Offence: Weapons & Armament > 3 - Air-to-Air Weapons > 3.2 - AIM-9M Sidewinder

steps.action: Set IR COOL switch to NORM. Infrared seeker in the AIM-9 nose must be cooled down to increase sensitivity and reduce background noise. There is enough coolant for 3 hours.
Weapon Select Switch – SIDEWINDER, or « LSHIFT+S »
Master Mode switch will be automatically set to A/A

Press and hold the Cage/Uncage switch to uncage the Sidewinder (« C » by default). Once uncaged, the Sidewinder should be actively looking for a lock on the closest heat signature. As you uncage the Sidewinder, you should hear a low growl tone when the missile seeker is searching.
